title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA full（第10部分）
content:
Sentiment-LDA local dependency model which assumes that the sentiments of words form a Markov chain. Mining and 2004 hu and liu ACM US POS tag identify-- Summarizing >adj.

Customer Reviews extraction→seed lexicon A-8 RTDS S 21 14 01 1 ANNEX B PROJECT BUDGET SUMMARY OF PROJECT BUDGET Item Cost Manpower: 60000 Equipment/ Facilities: NIL. 0 Other Operating Expenditure: 2000 Overseas Conference Travel 5000 Total (exclusive of GST) 67000 Notes: 1. The prices stated are exclusive of Good and Services Tax (GST). B-1 RTDS S 21 14 01 1 ANNEX C IMPLEMENTATION TIME SCHEDULE AND DELIVERABLES Milestones and Deliverables: Deliverable No Description of Deliverables Date of Deliverable 6 Months Finish the design of the spatial-temporal online sentiment T0 + 6 Months learning algorithm. 1 Year Implement the algorithm on Flink and Redis with system T0 +12 Months optimizations. Then conduct detailed benchmarking studies. Note : T0 is the Effective date of the contract Note: 1. T0 is the Effective Date of the Contract. 2. Mid Term Report of the project (at D1/2), Final Report of the project (at D1) and Quadchart for the project (at D1) must be submitted to TL@SUTD. C-1 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: October 2017 Appendix A-1 Guidelines for Fundable / Non-Fundable Expenses of Research Projects Even if the expenses are allowable as stated in this guideline, they are subject to approval from TL Director and MINDEF. Should there be any audit queries subsequently, PIs are accountable for the claims submitted and liable to repay any rejected claims. Type of Expenses Description EOM Related Expenses PI’s Expenditure Not allowable on Manpower (EOM) Cost EOM includes salaries, CPF and fringe benefits including medical, dental, contribution to welfare fund, bonuses, incentive payment etc. PI’s Summer Allowable Salary Cost Maximum of 1 month per PI per year for DIRP and TL direct projects. Subject to approval from TL Director. SEED projects do NOT allow PIs to draw summer salary. Salaries, CPF and Allowable Fringe Benefits - including Medical, As part of overall compensation to employees provided such costs are reasonable Dental, and incurred under formally established and consistently applied policies of the Contribution to University. Welfare Fund, etc. (for Other The salaries offered to staff should be reasonable, in line with local market Research Staff, benchmarks and comply with formal established pay scale of the University that is excluding PI’s) consistently applied regardless of the source of funds. Please refer to Office of Human Resources and Admin for the budget guidelines for Expenditure of Manpower (EOM). For employees who spend less than 100% of their time on the project, their salaries should be pro-rated/allocated accordingly. Final package and bonus/incentives are subject to TL Director’s Approval. Bonus / Incentive Allowable Payments (for Other Research As part of a total compensation package, provided such payments are reasonable Staff, excluding and are made according to a formal policy of the University that is consistently PI’s) applied regardless of the source of funds. Final package and bonus/incentives are subject to TL Director’s Approval.
